_comment: Gzipped size budget for SvelteKit eager route JS. Assets (CSS/fonts/images) excluded. See README 'Bundle analysis' for how to bump intentionally.
_largest_chunk_note: R53 introduced Plotly + Mermaid + KaTeX as lazy chunks. Plotly's `plotly.js-dist-min` ships a ~1.4 MB gzip blob no matter how we split it; it loads only when an assistant turn includes a `plotly` fenced block (rare). The 1500 KB cap accommodates that worst-case lazy chunk; the eager budgets (entry / route / total) stay tight. Tracking a real fix in R67-followup: gate Plotly behind a Settings toggle so users without chart needs never download it.
